summary: Joel Spolsky shares a brief testimonial from Eric J. Smith, who discovered through reading about FogBugz that it could handle all of his product management needs for CodeSmith. The post serves as a quick endorsement highlighting the marketing value of having quality written content about your product.
key_points: A well-written book about your product serves as powerful marketing that converts readers into customers
FogBugz positioned itself as an all-in-one tool for support, sales, bug tracking, and project management
Third-party testimonials and organic discovery stories are effective social proof
money_quotes: Having a great book about your product, by a great author, pays off in spades.
key_insight: Quality written content about your product can be one of the most effective marketing tools, leading potential customers to discover its value on their own.
